summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Instagram reporting automation app. All backend APIs working correctly, frontend UI fully functional with proper navigation and CRUD operations.

mocked_integrations.issue: Instagram login and reporting functionality is MOCKED - uses instagrapi library but will fail without real IG credentials
